name: x402nano-mcp
description: MCP server for x402nano prediction-market intelligence and paid Polymarket deltas.
author: Bobby Bowles

tools.name: list_trending_markets
tools.description: List currently trending prediction markets and their slugs for later paid intelligence calls.

tools.name: get_market_pricing
tools.description: Get current pricing and payment metadata for x402nano services (no parameters required).

tools.name: get_market_brief
tools.description: Paid tool (0.05 USDC): returns a structured brief for a given market.

tools.name: get_market_delta
tools.description: Paid tool (0.05 USDC): returns recent probability and pricing deltas for a given market since a prior check.

since.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the previous check (e.g., '2026-06-20T00:00:00.000Z').
